"E:\clion\CLion 2025.3.1.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\New_C.dir/objects.a
"E:\clion\CLion 2025.3.1.1\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\New_C.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\New_C.dir\objects1.rsp
"E:\clion\CLion 2025.3.1.1\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\New_C.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o New_C.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libNew_C.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\New_C.dir\linkLibs.rsp
